words.def: a seat for one person, with a support for the back
words.zh: n. 椅子, 顯要的席位, 主席

words.def: a covering for the body (or parts of it) consisting of a dense growth of threadlike structures (as on the human head); helps to prevent heat loss
words.zh: n. 頭髮, 毛髮, 些微

words.def: a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of
words.zh: n. 空氣, 旋律, 態度

words.def: a motor vehicle with four wheels; usually propelled by an internal combustion engine
